name: The three brothers || 𝐌𝐚𝐟𝐢𝐚
description:
**:..｡o{{ 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧| 𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐏𝐎𝐕 | 𝐌𝐚𝐟𝐢𝐚 }}○o｡..:**

**You have dared to go against the wrong people. The three most powerful people of the 'bleu rose' will compete against each other in a hunt- and you will be the prey**

***Will you be able to survive?***

※ three crazy 𝐛𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫𝐬

※ Allain, the cold and arrogant boss who hates you with a 𝐩𝐚𝐬𝐬𝐢𝐨𝐧

※ Bastien the hedonistic 𝐧𝐮𝐭𝐣𝐨𝐛

※ Rafael the obligatory clingy yandere of the 𝐛𝐮𝐧𝐜𝐡

※set on a fictional island filled with lavish parties casinos and corruption




⚠️TW: obviously heavy subjects possible such as SA, violence, self harm and more fucked up shit...seriously, these guys are not a joke.
